game.title: Game
game.description: Cardmarket game section to target. Maps to the URL path segment (e.g. YuGiOh, Pokemon, Magic).

searchQueries.title: Search queries
searchQueries.description: Card names / free-text searches. Each is run against Cardmarket search, then every matching product is exploded into seller offers. Leave empty if you pass product URLs directly.

productUrls.title: Product URLs (optional)
productUrls.description: Direct Cardmarket single-product URLs. More reliable than search — skips the search step and scrapes offers straight away.

siteLanguage.title: Site language
siteLanguage.description: Cardmarket localization (URL locale prefix). Only affects labels, not the offers themselves.

maxProductsPerQuery.title: Max products per query
maxProductsPerQuery.description: Cap on how many products to open per search query.

maxOffersPerProduct.title: Max offers per product
maxOffersPerProduct.description: Cap on seller offers extracted per product page.

minCondition.title: Minimum condition
minCondition.description: Drop offers below this condition. MT > NM > EX > GD > LP > PL > PO.

cardLanguage.title: Card language filter (optional)
cardLanguage.description: Keep only offers whose card is in this language. Leave empty for all languages.

sellerCountry.title: Seller country filter (optional)
sellerCountry.description: ISO 2-letter country code to keep only sellers from that country (e.g. IT). Leave empty for all.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Cardmarket sits behind Cloudflare. RESIDENTIAL proxies are strongly recommended.

maxConcurrency.title: Max concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Parallel requests. Keep low to avoid tripping Cloudflare.

maxRetries.title: Max retries per request
maxRetries.description: Retries with a fresh proxy IP + impersonation profile on Cloudflare block or error.

debugSaveHtml.title: Save HTML on parse failure
debugSaveHtml.description: Dump raw HTML to the key-value store when a page yields 0 rows, so selectors can be patched.

unblockerProvider.title: Unblocker provider
unblockerProvider.description: Managed unblocker that solves Cardmarket's Cloudflare challenge server-side. RECOMMENDED path. Requires an API key below. 'none' falls back to browser/HTTP (usually blocked).

unblockerApiKey.title: Unblocker API key
unblockerApiKey.description: Your ZenRows or Scrapfly API key. Get a free ZenRows key (1,000 credits) at zenrows.com. Stored encrypted.

unblockerCountry.title: Unblocker exit country (optional)
unblockerCountry.description: ISO 2-letter country for the unblocker's residential exit IP (e.g. de, it). Leave empty to let the provider choose.

useBrowser.title: Use real browser (fallback only)
useBrowser.description: Only used when unblockerProvider = none. Requires the Playwright/Camoufox image. Vanilla browsers are usually blocked by Cardmarket's Cloudflare.

browserEngine.title: Browser engine (fallback only)
browserEngine.description: Which browser to use when unblockerProvider = none and useBrowser = true.
